name: Oriental Chicken with Cashew Nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into 1-inch cubes.
2. Marinate the chicken in sherry, 1 teaspoon cornstarch, and a dash of soy sauce for 30 minutes.
3. Heat oil in a wok or large frying pan.
4. Add the marinated chicken (drained) and stir-fry until cooked. Remove the chicken from the pan and stir-fry the mushrooms.
5. Add most of the broth to the pan, saving enough to dissolve the remaining cornstarch.
6. Gradually add hoisin sauce, tasting to avoid making it too strong. Adjust seasoning as desired.
7. Add the remaining cornstarch and broth; cook until done, adding water chestnuts.
8. Cook Ramen noodles using only 2 of the flavor packages. At the last moment, add cashews just to heat.
9. Serve the mixture over the cooked noodles. You can also add snow peas or other Chinese vegetables, or use peanuts or walnuts.
